# Athena Product Requirements Document (PRD) Template

> Use this template to define **what** should be built and **why** before implementation begins.

```yaml
---
title: "<Product / Feature Name>"
version: "0.1.0"
status: "draft"
owner: "<Product Owner>"
classification: "prd"
last_updated: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---
```

# <Product / Feature Name>

## Document Information

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Product | <Name> |
| Owner | <Product Owner> |
| Version | 0.1.0 |
| Status | Draft |

---

# Executive Summary

Summarize the feature in 3–5 sentences.

---

# Problem Statement

Describe the user or business problem.

---

# Goals

- Goal 1
- Goal 2
- Goal 3

## Non-Goals

- Non-goal 1
- Non-goal 2

---

# Success Metrics

| Metric | Target |
|---|---|
| Adoption | |
| Time Saved | |
| Error Rate | |

---

# Stakeholders

| Role | Responsibility |
|---|---|
| Product Owner | |
| Engineering | |
| Design | |
| Security | |

---

# Personas

Describe primary and secondary users.

---

# User Stories

```text
As a <user>,
I want <capability>,
So that <business outcome>.
```

---

# Functional Requirements

| ID | Requirement | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| FR-001 | | High |

---

# Non-Functional Requirements

- Performance
- Availability
- Accessibility
- Localization
- Scalability

---

# Business Rules

- Rule 1
- Rule 2

---

# UX Overview

Summarize the intended user experience.

Reference a UX specification if available.

---

# Dependencies

- Internal services
- External integrations
- Third-party providers

---

# Risks

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

---

# Security & Privacy

Document:

- Authentication
- Authorization
- Data classification
- Privacy considerations
- Audit requirements

---

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Requirement 1 satisfied.
- [ ] Requirement 2 satisfied.
- [ ] Security review completed.
- [ ] Product owner approval.

---

# Deliverables

- TDD
- API Specification
- UX Specification
- Database Specification
- Test Plan
- Runbook

---

- Architecture
- Security Specification
- Roadmap
